root_cause: Executable domain bundle generation was still Marketing-specific even after domain identity resolution became registry-visible.
runtime_model: Generic domain factory runtime consumes DOMAIN_BUNDLE_REGISTRY resolution artifacts.
Domain creation prompts resolve to MARKETING, SERVER_MANAGEMENT, TRADING, or HEALTHCARE through registry-backed artifact targets.
Factory authorization derives exact artifact manifests and content hashes from the resolved registry entry.
Factory creation preserves CREATE_ONLY target absence preflight and per-artifact verification.
Post-execution replay review reconstructs registry-driven executable bundles through bundle id resolution.
Failure paths emit a terminal fail-closed bundle result without requiring missing success artifacts.
replay_impact: Executable bundle replay remains append-only and uses the existing four-step bundle replay sequence.
Registry resolution replay is nested under executable bundle replay for reconstruction.
Registry hash and entry hash continuity are recorded in authorization, evidence, verification, and bundle artifacts.
Replay review no longer assumes Marketing-only manifests for registry-backed bundle ids.
CREATE_ONLY collisions remain deterministic fail-closed outcomes without missing-artifact cascade failures.
boundaries_preserved: No clinical, patient-data, or healthcare compliance authority.
No deployment or server mutation authority.
No overwrite, delete, rename, move, recursive creation, implicit creation, or directory creation authority.

validation_commands.summary: CLI lifecycle reached executable bundle verification, post-execution replay review, and governed termination.
